A '''detention cell''' was located on [[Level 139]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. It was used to imprison [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].

==Behind the scenes==
The non-[[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]] identified the cell as "Detention Cell 5305."<ref name="Tag">[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]]</ref>
